sections.title: Equipment Modification Authorization Permit
sections.html:
PERMIT SECTION

Permit Number: [DATE]-[MISH27]-[SEQ]

Pre-work Conditions Checklist

☐ Manufacturer's written approval obtained for modification

sections.title: Equipment Modification Authorization Permit (continued 2)
sections.html:
☐ Qualified engineer reviewed and approved modification design

☐ Modification does not reduce safety factor of equipment

☐ Capacity, operation, and maintenance instruction plates updated

☐ Tags or decals updated to reflect new capacity/operation

sections.title: Equipment Modification Authorization Permit (continued 3)
sections.html:
☐ Operators trained on modified equipment operation

☐ Maintenance personnel trained on modified equipment maintenance

☐ Inspection procedures updated for modified equipment

☐ Risk assessment completed for modification

sections.title: Equipment Modification Authorization Permit (continued 4)
sections.html:
☐ All safety devices and guards are functional post-modification

Work Authorization

Work Description

Location

Start Time

End Time

Authorized By

Required Controls Checklist

sections.title: Equipment Modification Authorization Permit (continued 5)
sections.html:
☐ Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedures implemented during modification

☐ Hot work permit obtained (if welding/cutting required)

☐ Fall protection used (if working at heights)

☐ Appropriate PPE worn (safety glasses, hard hat, steel-toe boots, etc.)

sections.title: Equipment Modification Authorization Permit (continued 6)
sections.html:
☐ Fire extinguisher available in work area

☐ Area barricaded to prevent unauthorized access
